debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
inst✝² : CompleteLattice α
inst✝¹ : DistribLattice α
inst✝ : BoundedOrder α
S D : Set α
R : @refinement α inst✝² inst✝ S
a b : α
hb : b ≤ a
hb' : b ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})
I : Set α
hI : I ∈ R
hI' : a ∈ I
⊢ b ≤ ⊥

failed_attempts:
have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
    intro h
    obtain ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩ := h
    have h_unique := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩)
    have h_unique' := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩)
    simp at h_unique h_unique'
    cases' h_unique with _ h_unique
    cases' h_unique' with _ h_unique'
    subst_vars
    exact h.2

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
    intro J hJ hJa
    have h_unique := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩)
    have h_unique' := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨J, hJ, hJa⟩)
    simp at h_unique h_unique'
    aesop

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
    intro J hJ hJa
    have h_unique := R.carrier_span a (by aesop) a (by aesop)
    have h_unique' := R.carrier_span a (by aesop) J (by aesop)
    aesop

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · rw [Set.iUnion_diff]
    apply le_sSup
    use I, hI
    simp [hI']

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · intro h
    apply hb'
    simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
    refine ⟨I, hI, ?_⟩
    exact ⟨hI', h⟩

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hb'
    intro h
    obtain ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩ := h
    have h_unique := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩)
    have h_unique' := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩)
    simp at h_unique h_unique'
    cases' h_unique with _ h_unique
    cases' h_unique' with _ h_unique'
    have : I = J := by aesop
    subst this
    exact hb'
  · exact hb

have h_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have h_not_bot : ⊥ ∉ I := R.bot_not_mem I hI
  have h_unique : ∀ x ∈ I, x ≠ ⊥ := by
    intro x hx
    exact fun h ↦ h_not_bot (h ▸ hx)
  have h_disjoint : Disjoint a (sSup (I \ {a})) := by
    apply h_indep
    · exact hI'
    · simp [Set.mem_diff, hI']
    · simp [Set.mem_diff, hI']
  specialize h_disjoint.le_inf_le hb hb'
  simp_all

have h_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have h_a_not_bot : a ≠ ⊥ := by
    rintro rfl
    simp_all
  have h_b_le_sSup : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    calc
      b ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := hb'
      _ ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
        apply sSup_mono
        intro x hx
        simp_rw [Set.mem_diff] at hx
        obtain ⟨hx₁, hx₂⟩ := hx
        simp_rw [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx₁
        obtain ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩ := hx₁
        have h_unique : J = I := by
          apply Eq.symm
          apply (R.carrier_span a hI').1
          use J
          constructor
          · exact hJ
          · exact hxJ
        rw [h_unique] at hxJ
        exact ⟨hxJ, hx₂⟩
  have h_abot : a ⊓ b = ⊥ := by
    apply le_antisymm
    · apply inf_le_inf_right
      exact le_bot_iff.mpr (h_indep a hI' b h_b_le_sSup (by simp [h_a_not_bot]))
    · apply bot_le
  have h_b_eq_bot : b = ⊥ := by
    apply le_antisymm
    · exact h_indep a hI' b h_b_le_sSup h_abot
    · apply bot_le
  rw [h_b_eq_bot]
  exact le_rfl

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
    intro J hJ hJa
    cases' hJa with hJa hJa
    · exact hJa
    · aesop

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · intro h
    have : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
      calc
        b ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := hb'
        _ ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
          apply sSup_le_sSup
          intro x hx
          simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop] at hx
          obtain ⟨J, hJ, hxJ, hxa⟩ := hx
          have : J = I := by
            apply Eq.symm
            apply (R.carrier_span a hI').unique
            · use J
              exact ⟨hJ, by simp [hxJ, hxa]⟩
            · use I
              exact ⟨hI, by simp [hI']⟩
          rw [this]
          exact ⟨hI, hxJ, hxa⟩
    exact this

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · rw [Set.iUnion_diff_singleton]
    refine le_sSup_of_le (I \ {a}) (Set.mem_diff.2 ⟨hI', fun h ↦ ?_⟩) (le_sSup _ ?_)
    · simp_all
    · obtain ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩ := hb'
      exact le_sSup_of_le J hJ' (le_sSup _ hJ)

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
    intro h
    obtain ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩ := h
    have h_unique := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩)
    have h_unique' := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩)
    have h_eq : I = J := by
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      aesop
    rw [h_eq] at hJ
    exact hJ

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · rw [Set.iUnion_diff_singleton]
    refine le_sSup (Set.image_subset _ _) ?_
    use I, hI
    simp [hI']

have h_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have h_not_bot : ⊥ ∉ I := R.bot_not_mem I hI
  have h_unique : ∀ x ∈ I, x ≠ ⊥ := by
    intro x hx
    intro h
    rw [h] at hx
    exact h_not_bot hx
  have h_disjoint : Disjoint a (sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})) := by
    apply le_inf_eq_bot.2
    intro x hx
    have h1 : x ≤ a := le_inf_iff.1 hx |>.1
    have h2 : x ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := le_inf_iff.1 hx |>.2
    have h3 : x = ⊥ := by
      apply le_antisymm
      · exact le_bot_iff.2 (by
          apply h_indep a hI' (sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})) ?_ ?_
          · exact le_trans h1 (le_sSup_of_mem hI')
          · exact le_trans h2 (le_sSup_of_mem (Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩))
          · intro y hy
            simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
            obtain ⟨J, hJ, hyJ, hyne⟩ := hy
            have h_unique_J : ∀ z ∈ J, z ≠ ⊥ := by
              intro z hz
              intro h
              rw [h] at hz
              exact R.bot_not_mem J hJ hz
            have hIJ : I = J := by
              apply Eq.symm
              apply (R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩)).2
              apply (R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨J, hJ, hyJ⟩)).1
              rfl
            rw [hIJ] at hyne
            exact hyne
        )
      · exact bot_le
    exact h3
  exact le_trans hb (le_trans hb' (le_inf_iff.2 ⟨le_rfl, le_sSup_of_mem (Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩)⟩)) ▸ h_disjoint.le_bot

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hb'
    intro h
    obtain ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩ := h
    have h_unique := R.carrier_span a (by aesop) a (by aesop)
    simp at h_unique
    have h_eq := h_unique J hJ
    simp at h_eq
    subst_vars
    exact hb' ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩
  · exact hb

have h_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have h_not_bot : ⊥ ∉ I := R.bot_not_mem I hI
  have h_eq : a = sSup I := by
    have h_unique := R.carrier_span _ (by aesop)
    aesop
  have h_le : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
    calc
      b ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := hb'
      _ ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
        apply sSup_le_sSup
        intro x hx
        simp at hx
        obtain ⟨J, hJ, hxJ, hne⟩ := hx
        have h_unique_J := R.carrier_span x (by aesop)
        have h_unique_I := R.carrier_span x (by aesop)
        have h_eq_J_I : J = I := by
          aesop
        subst h_eq_J_I
        exact ⟨hxJ, hne⟩
  have h_inf : a ⊓ b = ⊥ := by
    calc
      a ⊓ b = sSup I ⊓ b := by rw [h_eq]
      _ = sSup (I.image (· ⊓ b)) := by rw [sSup_inf_eq_Inf_Sup]
      _ ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := by
        apply sSup_le_sSup
        intro x hx
        simp at hx
        cases' hx with hx hx
        · exfalso
          have h_x_eq_a : x = a := by
            have h_unique_x := R.carrier_span x (by aesop)
            have h_unique_a := R.carrier_span a (by aesop)
            aesop
          subst h_x_eq_a
          exact hx
        · exact le_rfl
      _ ≤ b := by
        apply le_trans h_le
        apply sSup_le
        intro x hx
        exact le_of_eq (by aesop)
  have h_disjoint : Disjoint a b := by
    rw [disjoint_iff]
    exact h_inf
  have h_zero : b = ⊥ := by
    apply le_antisymm
    · exact hb'
    · apply bot_le
  rw [h_zero]
  exact le_rfl

have : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply this
  · exact hI'
  · refine le_trans hb hb'
    simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
    intro h
    aesop
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hb'
    aesop

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · rw [Set.mem_diff]
    constructor
    · exact hb'
    · exact hI'

have h_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have h_eq : a = sSup I := (R.carrier_span a (by aesop)).exists_unique.some.symm
  have h_bot : b ≤ ⊥ := by
    calc
      b ≤ a := hb
      _ = sSup I := h_eq
      _ ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) ⊔ a := by
        apply le_sup_of_le_left
        apply sSup_le_sSup
        intro x hx
        simp at hx
        aesop
      _ ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) ⊔ a := by
        apply sup_le_sup
        · apply sSup_le_sSup
          intro x hx
          simp at hx
          obtain ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩ := hx
          exact Set.mem_iUnion₂.mpr ⟨J, hJ, hxJ⟩
        · rfl
      _ = sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
        rw [sup_eq_right]
        exact hb'
  exact h_bot

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion] at hb'
  intro h
  obtain ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩ := h
  have h_unique := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩)
  have h_unique' := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩)
  simp at h_unique h_unique'
  cases' h_unique with D hD
  cases' h_unique' with D' hD'
  have h_eq : D = D' := by aesop
  subst h_eq
  exact hb'

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · rw [Set.iUnion_diff_singleton]
    refine le_sSup (Set.image_subset _ _) ?_
    use I, hI
    simp [hI']

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
  intro J hJ hJa
  exact hb' ⟨J, hJ, hJa⟩

have h_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have h_not_bot : ⊥ ∉ I := R.bot_not_mem I hI
  have h_unique : ∀ x ∈ I, x ≠ ⊥ := by
    intro x hx
    exact h_not_bot (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mpr (by aesop))
  have h_disj : Disjoint a (sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})) := by
    apply le_inf_eq_bot_iff.mp
    -- Since a ∈ I and I is independent, a is disjoint from the sup of the rest of I
    have h_rest : sSup (I \ {a}) ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
      apply sSup_mono
      intro x hx
      simp_rw [Set.mem_diff] at hx
      obtain ⟨hx₁, hx₂⟩ := hx
      refine ⟨I, hI, hx₁, ?_⟩
      intro h_eq
      apply hx₂
      exact h_eq
    calc
      a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})
        ≤ a ⊓ sSup (I \ {a}) := inf_le_inf_right _ h_rest
      _ = ⊥ := h_indep.eq_bot_of_sdiff a hI' (by simp)
  exact le_inf_eq_bot_iff.mp h_disj hb hb'

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · rw [Set.iUnion_diff]
    apply le_sSup
    refine ⟨I, hI, ?_⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop]
    refine ⟨hI', fun h ↦ ?_⟩
    aesop

have hb'' : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_trans hb' (sSup_mono (Set.diff_subset_diff_right (Set.subset_iUnion_of_mem hI)))
  have hI_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  exact hI_indep a hI' b hb hb''

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
    intro J hJ hJa
    have h_unique := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩)
    have h_unique' := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨J, hJ, hJa⟩)
    have h_eq : I = J := (h_unique J hJ hJa).symm.trans (h_unique I hI hI')
    rw [h_eq] at hI
    exact hb'

have h_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have h_not_bot : ⊥ ∉ I := R.bot_not_mem I hI
  have h_unique : ∀ J ∈ R, a = sSup J → J = I := by
    intro J hJ h_eq
    have := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at ha; aesop) 
    aesop
  have h_disj : Disjoint (I \ {a}) {a} := by
    ext x
    simp
  have h_sSup_diff : sSup (I \ {a}) ≤ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
    apply sSup_le_sSup
    intro x hx
    simp at hx
    aesop
  have h_b_le : b ≤ sSup (I \ {a}) := le_trans hb' h_sSup_diff
  have h_a_notin : a ∉ I \ {a} := by simp
  exact h_indep a hI' b (by aesop) h_b_le

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · rw [Set.iUnion_diff]
    refine le_sSup_of_le _ ?_
    · use I, hI
      exact Set.mem_setOf_eq.mpr ⟨hI', fun h ↦ hI'.symm ▸ h⟩
    · exact hb'

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b (by simpa [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion] using hb') hb

have h_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply h_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
    intro h
    obtain ⟨J, hJ, hJ'⟩ := h
    have h_unique := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; exact ⟨I, hI, hI'⟩)
    have h_eq := h_unique J hJ
    simp at h_eq
    aesop

have h_indep : sSupIndep I := R.carrier_indep I hI
  have h_not_bot : ⊥ ∉ I := R.bot_not_mem I hI
  have h_unique : ∀ ⦃J⦄, J ∈ R → a = sSup J → J = I := by
    intro J hJ h_eq
    have h1 := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion] at ha; tauto)
    have h2 := R.carrier_span a (by simp_rw [decomposition_of_refinement, Set.mem_iUnion]; tauto)
    aesop
  have h_disj : Disjoint (principal a) (sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a})) := by
    apply le_inf_iff.mpr
    constructor
    · exact hb
    · exact hb'
  have h_inter : a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) = ⊥ := by
    simpa [Disjoint, inf_comm] using h_disj
  have h_b_le_inf : b ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := by
    exact le_inf hb hb'
  calc
    b ≤ a ⊓ sSup ((⋃ D ∈ R, D) \ {a}) := h_b_le_inf
    _ = ⊥ := h_inter

have hI_indep := R.carrier_indep I hI
  apply hI_indep a hI' b
  · exact hb
  · intro h
    apply hb'
    simp_rw [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion]
    refine ⟨I, hI, ?_⟩
    exact ⟨hI', h⟩
